Pass it as the `world_model` argument of the `python` tool call, alongside `code`. That argument is the one that carries forward, so send it on every call, even when you reply with a tool call and no assistant text.

sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'W', 'b', 'c'):
        print(f"{n['color']}: {n['boundary']}, px={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Key observations:
1. Player at rows 24-27, cols 40-42 (N)
2. White bar at [[24, 43], [27, 43]] (W) - to the right of player
3. Right frame is GONE! (c: [[24, 44], [24, 47], [27, 47], [27, 44]] is gone)
4. Right frame's blue target still at [[25, 45], [25, 46], [26, 46], [26, 45]] (b)
5. Left frame reappeared as charcoal at [[32, 24], [32, 27], [35, 27], [35, 24]] (c)
6. Center frame still at [[32, 32], [32, 35], [35, 35], [35, 32]] (c)
7. Blue target at [[33, 25], [33, 26], [34, 26], [34, 25]] (b) - inside left frame
8. HUD bar px=17
So the right frame broke when the player moved into its space (rows 24-27, cols 40-42 is adjacent to/overlapping the right frame's cols 44-47). The white bar appeared at [[24, 43], [27, 43]], which is between the player and the right frame's blue target.
Now I need to press SPACE to convert the right frame to white. The player is at rows 24-27, cols 40-42, adjacent to where the right frame was (cols 44-47).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Right frame broke! Player at rows 24-27, cols 40-42
# White bar at [[24, 43], [27, 43]]
# Need to SPACE to convert right frame to white

action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"RIGHT": "Moves player +4 cols", "UP": "Moves player -3 rows", "LEFT": "Moves player -3 cols", "DOWN": "Moves player +4 rows", "SPACE": "Converts broken frame to white frame"}, "object_taxonomy": {"charcoal_frame": "Breaks when player enters space", "white_frame": "Converted from charcoal via SPACE", "blue_center": "Target inside frame", "green_object": "Player", "pink_bar": "HUD timer", "charcoal_hud_bar": "Step counter"}, "hud_map": {"bottom_row": "HUD"}, "win_pattern": "Break all frames then SPACE each to convert to white", "level_log": {"level_1": "Right frame broke, need SPACE"}, "cross_level_notes": ""}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Level 1: Right frame broke, player adjacent.", "goal_model": "Convert all 3 frames to white", "recent_findings": [], "open_questions": [], "current_plan": "SPACE to convert right frame, then go back for others", "strategy_log": [], "failed_probes": []}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
